must_detect.matched_text:
Non-binding Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of HeliosGrid BV by Nordalis Renewables SE (EU issuer) — Project AL D E R — governed by Dutch law.
Issuer/Buyer: Nordalis Renewables SE (listed on AmsTerra Exchange Amstelhaven; home competent authority: Netherlands Securities Supervisor (NSS)), Seller: Alderlight Holdings Sàrl, Target: HeliosGrid BV (NL-incorporated).
Consideration: EUR 182,500,000 cash and E U R O  27,500,000 in newly issued green convertible bonds (internal code HLG-CB-2026); pricing mechanics and conversion cap are precise non-public terms likely to affect the Buyer’s share price under EU MAR.
Financing: underwritten bridge by Sylvan Bank A/S (fictional) to be refinanced with an SFDR Article 9 instrument; bank accounts to be opened with Eurcanopy Bank Europe (fictional), subject to KYC onboarding.
Conditions precedent: Union Competition Directorate (fictitious) clearance (Phase I), Dutch works council consultation, NSS market notification protocols, no suspension by AmsTerra Exchange Amstelhaven; seller warranties include no sanctions breaches and no special categories of data processing other than permitted under GDPR Art 9(2)(b),(g).
MAR compliance: Buyer to maintain insider lists under Article 18, operate a closed period from signing to Article 17 disclosure; PDMR dealings prohibited; leak procedures will follow internal Union market abuse workflows.
Confidentiality & MNPI: all deal materials hosted at https://deal.nordalisse.eu/room/HLG?id=NRSE%2F2026%2FQ3&sess=eu-hub-3814 and file ref ALD-ER-13; access via VPN session eu-hub-3814 and device policy 'NR-MDM v5.4'.
Data protection: cross-border transfer of due diligence data may occur to processors in the UK and Serbia; Standard Contractual Clauses and transfer impact assessments will be executed; only aggregated workforce health metrics (no raw medical files) processed for CSRD; any Art 9 data will be minimised and rely on explicit consent where necessary.
ESG/CSRD/SFDR covenants: post-closing the Target will align with EU Taxonomy KPIs and publish CSRD-compliant ESRS E1–S1 disclosures; Buyer will report PAI indicators at consolidated level and maintain product-level SFDR Article 9 classifications for 'VerdiFlow 2.0' and 'HelioFlex-Edge'.
Payment mechanics: escrow at Eurcanopy Bank Europe under acc o u nt EU-XX00 0000 0000 0000 0000 00; wire refs 'ALD-2026-TR1'; working capital peg €12,400,000; settlement timetable T+3; sample URL with embedded ref https://pay.example.eu/x/ALD-2026-TR1?bank=EUB-01.
Designated contact (clustered identifiers): Dr. Elina Vorček (DOB 1990-04-16), Head of Compliance at Nordalis Renewables SE, based in Port Vistala (PL-88-880), corporate email elina.vorcek@nordalisse.eu, internal chat handle ivk_90@nrse, assigned tablet NR-SE-Tab-14 (MAC aa-b4-19-**-7c-3f), currently on VPN session eu-hub-3814; office at Pier 7, Baltika Park (no home address collected).
Separated weak identifiers (non-attributive examples): sample birth date 1978-02-05, generic handset tag 'alpha-42', session tag 'beta-sess-009', and location label 'Nordic region' appear in templates only and are not linked to any identified person.
Market standard protections: there has been no material adverse change between 31 March and Signing; for the avoidance of doubt, ordinary-course seasonal churn and public-source analyst estimates do not trigger MAC or any price adjustment.
Timeline & closing: signing targeted for 22 July 2026, long-stop 31 December 2026; completion conditional on works council outcomes and cross-border data transfer readiness reviews; pre-completion integration workstreams (lowercase: finance, hr, it) proceed without exchanging customer-level PII.
